name: serious-review
description: Parallel review from correctness, tests, security, and cleanup angles

parallel.label: Correctness
parallel.task:
Review the current diff for correctness, regressions, edge cases, and likely runtime failures. Do not modify project/source files. Return concrete findings with file paths and line references.

Scope: {task}

parallel.label: Tests
parallel.task:
Review the current diff for missing tests, weak assertions, invalid mocks, and validation gaps. Do not modify project/source files. Return concrete findings with file paths and line references.

Scope: {task}

parallel.label: Security
parallel.task:
Review the current diff for security, privacy, injection, authz/authn, secret handling, and dependency risks. Do not modify project/source files. Return concrete findings with file paths and line references.

Scope: {task}

parallel.label: Cleanup
parallel.task:
Review the current diff for simplicity, maintainability, duplication, verbosity, and AI-slop. Do not modify project/source files. Return concrete findings with file paths and line references.

Scope: {task}
